вЧЛ Match a Unicode digit exactly 8 times.

вЧЛ Match a Unicode digit greedily at least 7 and at most 8 times.
вЧЛ Optional (greedy).
вЧЛ Match '-'.
вЧЛ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
вЧЛ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

Pattern:
^[a-zA-Z](?!.*[_-]{2})[\\w-]{2,14}[a-zA-Z0-9]$
Explanation:
вЧЛ Match if at the beginning of the string.
вЧЛ Match a character in the set [A-Za-z].
вЧЛ Zero-width negative lookahead.
вЧЛ Match a character other than '\n' greedily any number of times.
вЧЛ Match a character in the set [-_] exactly 2 times.
вЧЛ Match a character in the set [-\w] greedily at least 2 and at most 14 times.
вЧЛ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Za-z].
вЧЛ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.
